option.name: originalContent
option.value:
# Copy to .env.local and adjust for your environment.
# Backend API host (must include protocol, no trailing slash is preferred) NEXT_PUBLIC_BACKEND_HOST=http://localhost:5272

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
# Copy to .env.local and adjust for your environment.
# Backend API host (must include protocol, no trailing slash is preferred) NEXT_PUBLIC_BACKEND_HOST=http://localhost:5272

option.name: originalContent
option.value: # Run and deploy your AI Studio app This contains everything you need to run your app locally. View your app in AI Studio: https://ai.studio/apps/f79ff592-8cb2-481a-b7e5-1fc7888c3a0d ## Run Locally **Prerequisites:** Node.js 1. Install dependencies: `npm install` 2. Set the `GEMINI_API_KEY` in [.env.local](.env.local) to your Gemini API key 3. Run the app: `npm run dev`

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: # Run and deploy your AI Studio app This contains everything you need to run your app locally. View your app in AI Studio: https://ai.studio/apps/f79ff592-8cb2-481a-b7e5-1fc7888c3a0d ## Run Locally **Prerequisites:** Node.js 1. Install dependencies: `npm install` 2. Set environment variables in [.env.local](.env.local): - `GEMINI_API_KEY` (Gemini API key) - `NEXT_PUBLIC_BACKEND_HOST` (backend API host, e.g. `https://localhost:44374`) You can start from [.env.example](.env.example). 3. Run the app: `npm run dev`
